sessions.summary: Fixed identity persistence (keys now survive restarts), added basic session memory layer

decisions.rationale: Old Kilo system is 2.2GB, too complex to introduce now
Keep it minimal - file-backed JSON storage

files_changed.description: Changed from ephemeral to persistent keys

next_steps: Create a load-context script that agent can run at session start
Add SessionMemory to Archivist-Agent and library lanes
Explore how to inject context into new agent sessions
Test: Close this session, open new one, verify context loads

key_insights.insight: Identity needs persistent keys + memory needs to store something
Keep each layer simple - composition over complexity
